_comment: This file is public. Hash-chain it with your PGP key for authenticity.

audits.title: Q1 2026 Cryptographic Code Review
audits.summary: Independent review of cryptographic implementations including AES-256-GCM secure storage rewrite, WireGuard tunnel manager, PQC ML-KEM-768 hybrid PSK, and Electron IPC security. Reviewers granted read-only access to the full codebase.

certifications.name: No-Logs Policy
certifications.description: No VPN connection logs, timestamps, DNS queries, or IP metadata are retained on any Nebula VPN infrastructure.

certifications.name: Open-Source Client
certifications.description: The full Electron + React client code is publicly auditable and verifiable.

certifications.name: AES-256-GCM Local Encryption
certifications.description: All locally-cached credentials use AES-256-GCM via WebCrypto SubtleCrypto with PBKDF2-SHA-256 key derivation (100 000 iterations).

certifications.name: FIPS 203 ML-KEM-768 PQC Key Exchange
certifications.description: WireGuard PSK layer uses a hybrid ML-KEM-768 + X25519 key exchange, providing 128-bit post-quantum security against harvest-now-decrypt-later attacks.

certifications.name: DNS-over-HTTPS / DNS-over-TLS
certifications.description: All DNS queries can be routed through an encrypted DoH or DoT proxy (127.0.0.53) to prevent DNS leaks.

securityContact.responseTime: 48 hours for critical, 7 days for all others
